assertions.title: End-to-end pipeline completes all 8 steps

steps.action: Run build and advance pipeline repeatedly, then read /api/status
steps.observed: POST /api/build returned 200 with files_written, and /api/pipeline/advance returned pipeline_complete, but /api/status step_statuses remained step1..step7=pending and step8=in_progress

steps.action: Check all spaces and generated files
steps.expected: All spaces filled and at least one generated file exists
steps.observed: All five spaces showed filled slots=true and generated files existed under output/v19/

assertions.issues: Step completion criteria were not met even though build/files/spaces succeeded.

assertions.title: Act 2 uses Act 1 outputs as input context

steps.action: Run deterministic Act 1 + Act 2 flow with mode=mock
steps.expected: Step 3 extraction uses Problem Space context
steps.observed: Step 3 extraction succeeded with vocabulary including User, Task, Workspace

steps.action: Compare problem/audience text to solution vocabulary terms
steps.expected: At least one vocabulary term appears in Problem Space text
steps.observed: problem/audience text contained case-insensitive matches for User, Task, and Workspace

evidence.network: POST /api/vibe/start -> 200; POST /api/vibe/input -> 200; POST /api/vibe/extract (x2) -> 200; POST /api/domain/start -> 200; POST /api/domain/extract -> 200; GET /api/map/problem/problem -> 200; GET /api/map/problem/audience -> 200; GET /api/map/solution/vocabulary -> 200

assertions.title: Pipeline gate blocks premature Act 2 entry

steps.action: Temporarily remove problem/audience slot file, then call POST /api/domain/start
steps.expected: 400/422 with unfilled Problem Space slot error
steps.observed: HTTP 400 with error: Problem Space incomplete — unfilled slots: audience. Complete Act 1 first.

assertions.title: Pipeline gate blocks premature Act 3 entry

steps.action: Temporarily remove solution/vocabulary.yaml and call contract endpoint POST /api/build/snapshot
steps.observed: HTTP 404 not found (contract endpoint not implemented on this API surface)

steps.action: Call implemented endpoint POST /api/snapshot under same incomplete Solution Space condition
steps.observed: HTTP 422 with error: Solution Space incomplete — unfilled slots: vocabulary. Complete Act 2 first.

assertions.issues: Contract path /api/build/snapshot is missing (404) in current router; equivalent gate behavior exists on /api/snapshot.

assertions.title: Act 2 domain data round-trips through API without data loss

steps.action: Capture Step 3 extracted payload from POST /api/domain/extract
steps.expected: Structured domain data available for comparison

steps.action: Read back solution map endpoints and compare fields
steps.observed: All compared collections matched exactly (vocabulary, entities, relationships, user/system flows, architecture components/dependencies)

evidence.network: POST /api/domain/extract (step3) -> 200; GET /api/map/solution/vocabulary -> 200; GET /api/map/solution/domain/entities -> 200; GET /api/map/solution/domain/relationships -> 200; GET /api/map/solution/flows/user-flows -> 200; GET /api/map/solution/flows/system-flows -> 200; GET /api/map/solution/architecture/components -> 200; GET /api/map/solution/architecture/dependencies -> 200

assertions.title: Pipeline state persists through server restart (Act 1 → restart → Act 2)

steps.expected: Stop/start API and verify step1/step2 completed after restart
steps.observed: Not executed because validator isolation forbids restarting shared localhost services

assertions.issues: Blocked by isolation rule: no stop/restart of shared infrastructure.

assertions.title: Pipeline state persists mid-act (partial Act 2 → restart)

steps.expected: Complete Step 3, restart, then verify Step 3 completed and Step 4 pending
steps.observed: Not executed because validator isolation forbids restarting shared localhost services

assertions.issues: Blocked by isolation rule: no stop/restart of shared infrastructure.

frictions.description: No API reset endpoint exists for Problem/Solution slot preconditions, so gate assertions required temporary local file moves with immediate restoration.
frictions.resolution: Temporarily moved target slot files to evidence backups, executed checks, then restored files.

frictions.description: Validation contract references POST /api/build/snapshot, but current API exposes POST /api/snapshot.
frictions.resolution: Recorded contract path 404 and tested equivalent behavior at implemented path.

blockers.description: Restart-based assertions could not be executed because flow-validator isolation forbids stopping/restarting shared localhost services.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Captured baseline status evidence and evaluated non-restart assertions only; no safe non-disruptive substitute for restart semantics.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 3 passed, 2 failed, 2 blocked, 0 skipped. Fails: VAL-CROSS-001, VAL-CROSS-005.
